description.value: This value set includes sample Coverage Copayment Type codes.

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology (THO). THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license

definition.value: An office visit for a general practitioner of a discipline.
An office visit for a specialist practitioner of a discipline
An episode in an emergency department.
An episode of an Inpatient hospital stay.
A visit held where the patient is remote relative to the practitioner, e.g. by phone, computer or video conference.
A visit to an urgent care facility - typically a community care clinic.
Prescription drug and pharmacy-related services.
A standard percentage applied to all classes or service or product not otherwise specified.
A standard fixed currency amount applied to all classes or service or product not otherwise specified.
The accumulated amount of patient payment before the coverage begins to pay for services.
The accumulated amount applied toward the family's out-of-network deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered out-of-network services.
The accumulated amount applied toward the family's in-network deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered in-network services.

display.value: Family Pharmacy Out of Network Deductible

definition.value: The accumulated amount applied toward the family's out-of-network pharmacy deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered out-of-network pharmacy services.
The accumulated amount applied toward the family's in-network pharmacy deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered in-network pharmacy services.
The accumulated amount applied toward the individual's out-of-network deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered out-of-network services.
The accumulated amount applied toward the individual's in-network deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered in-network services.

display.value: Individual Pharmacy Out of Network Deductible

definition.value: The accumulated amount applied toward the individual's out-of-network pharmacy deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered out-of-network pharmacy services.
The accumulated amount applied toward the individual's in-network pharmacy deductible before the coverage begins to pay for covered in-network pharmacy services.
The maximum amout of payment for services which a patient, or family, is expected to incur - typically annually.

display.value: Family Out of Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that a family is expected to incur for covered out-of-network services.

display.value: Family In Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that a family is expected to incur for covered in-network services.

display.value: Family Pharmacy Out of Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that a family is expected to incur for covered out-of-network pharmacy services.

display.value: Family Pharmacy In Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that a family is expected to incur for covered in-network pharmacy services.

display.value: Individual Out of Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that an individual is expected to incur for covered out-of-network services.

display.value: Individual In Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that an individual is expected to incur for covered in-network services.

display.value: Individual Pharmacy Out of Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that an individual is expected to incur for covered out-of-network pharmacy services.

display.value: Individual Pharmacy In Network Out of Pocket Maximum

definition.value: The maximum amount of out-of-pocket payment that an individual is expected to incur for covered in-network pharmacy services.
